extract: Meganium (Japanese: メガニウム Meganium) is a Grass-type Pokémon introduced in Generation II. It evolves from Bayleef starting at level 32. It is the final form of Chikorita. Meganium can Mega Evolve into Mega Meganium using the Meganiumite. Mega Meganium was introduced in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
